ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "ingredient_type" TEXT /* Type of the ingredient (e.g., dairy, grain) */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the ingredient */,
  "cost_per_unit" TEXT /* Cost per unit of the ingredient */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient (e.g., kg, lbs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_supplier FOREIGN KEY ("supplier") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "cows" (
  "cow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cow */,
  "cow_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of feed consumed by the cow */,
  "cow_n" INTEGER /* Cow number identifier */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the cow */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the cow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feed_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analysis record */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ingredient being analyzed */,
  "moisture" REAL /* Moisture content of the ingredient */,
  "dry_matter" REAL /* Dry matter content of the ingredient */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the ingredient */,
  "CP" REAL /* Crude protein content */,
  "ADF" REAL /* Acid detergent fiber content */,
  "aNDF" REAL /* Neutral detergent fiber content */,
  "lignin" REAL /* Lignin content */,
  "starch" REAL /* Starch content */,
  "ESC" REAL /* Esc (soluble sugars) content */,
  "WSC" REAL /* Wsc (water-soluble carbohydrates) content */,
  "EE" REAL /* Ether extract (fat) content */,
  "TFA" REAL /* Total fat acid content */,
  "ash" REAL /* Ash content */,
  "OM" REAL /* Organic matter content */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the analysis */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the analysis */,
  "lab_id" TEXT /* ID of the lab performing the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feed_analysis_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feed_analysis_analysis_method FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_method") REFERENCES analysis_methods ("method_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feed_analysis_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feed_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ingredient in the batch */,
  "af_qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the ingredient in the batch (as fed) */,
  "af_head" INTEGER /* Head count of the ingredient */,
  "dm_fract" REAL /* Dry matter fraction */,
  "dm_qty" INTEGER /* Dry matter quantity in the batch */,
  "dm_head" REAL /* Head count for dry matter */,
  "pen_old" TEXT /* Old pen identifier */,
  "pen" TEXT /* New pen identifier */,
  "batch_date" TEXT /* Date the batch was created */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feed_batches_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feed_batches_pen FOREIGN KEY ("pen") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moisture_records" (
  "moisture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the moisture record */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ingredient */,
  "moisture_level" REAL /* Moisture level recorded */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the moisture record */,
  "lab_id" TEXT /* ID of the lab performing the moisture analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moisture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moisture_records_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feed_formulations" (
  "formulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the formulation */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ingredient used in the formulation */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the ingredient in the formulation */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related batch of feed */,
  "formulation_date" TEXT /* Date the formulation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feed_formulations_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES feed_batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feed_formulations_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., nutritionist, analyst) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "supplier_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab */,
  "lab_address" TEXT /* Address of the lab */,
  "lab_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the lab */,
  "lab_email" TEXT /* Email address of the lab */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method (e.g., Wet Chemistry, NIR Spectroscopy) */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
